source.title: Rejected Take Off Distance OEI Clear Area, EAPS OFF
source.rfm_source: Leonardo AW139 Rotorcraft Flight Manual (RFM), Ed. 2, Rev. 32

notes: Figure 4-56 extracted vector-first from PDF page S50-89.
Left panel uses the MAX OAT LIMIT line as the 50 °C top family, consistent with manual labelling.
Center panel weight curves are 6800 / 6600 / 6400 kg from left to right.
Manual note: multiply Distance Correction by HEADWIND component.
Pressure altitude overlay uses calibrated x-axis ticks for 8000 to -1000 ft.
